name: Stix Hooper
abstract: Nesbert "Stix" Hooper (born August 15, 1938) is an American drummer and founding member of The Crusaders.

about_quotes.speaker: Hubert Laws
about_quotes.evidence: There were six of us. At that time we were called the Modern Jazz Sextet. That’s what – I think Stix decided on that name. ... Wayne Henderson, and myself, along with Stix.
about_quotes.doc_title: Hubert Laws — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Gerald Wilson
about_quotes.evidence: Stix Hooper called me... I knew Stix very well... Stix came over and played with my band... Stix called me and he said... I want to record you... we got a nomination for the record
about_quotes.doc_title: Gerald Wilson — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Rowles
about_quotes.evidence: I got Andy Simpkins and Stix Hooper. And we worked up a tremendous trio.
